name: claude-fleet-portal
description: Locally-hosted web portal to launch, monitor and control a fleet of local Claude Code agents — Dynamic Workflows, subagents, Agent Teams, and Skills.

scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "CLAUDE_BIN=$PWD/tools/mock-claude.mjs pnpm --filter @fleet/server dev" "pnpm --filter @fleet/web dev"
